mapper.select: select c.*, u.username as reporter from complaints c left join users u on c.reporter_id = u.id where c.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update complaints set status = 'resolved', handle_note = #{handleNote}, handler_id = #{handlerId}, handled_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into complaints (target_type, target_id, reason, evidence,reporter_id) values (#{targetType},#{targetId},#{reason},#{evidence},#{reporterId})
